race.comment: YACHT GIRL (4) backs up quickly after making good late ground in the slop at Scone. Rates highly on best figures and can get the job done this time. POWER OF SUCCESS (1) continues to race well with a win two back at Toowoomba before finishing a close third last time. Has enough early dash to offset the wide draw. Expecting a bold showing. CHARLIE MAGIC (9) finished fourth two runs back then improved last start but found a couple better at Parkes. Well placed despite the sticky draw. MARIOTA (3) got the bob last start at a healthy price. Cannot be ruled out based on the latest effort and from the kind draw.
